task: Complete the requested browser workflow and collect the required output
playwright_python:
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)
    page = browser.new_page()
    page.goto('https://example.com/')
    page.get_by_role('button', name='Example').click()

steps.evidence: Selected Chrome backend type=extension with safe backend id=browser-extension-1; the connected extension tab was visible before navigation.
Browser reached https://example.com/ and observed the target page URL/title.

steps.intent: Perform the next required browser action
steps.wait_for: the expected UI state is visible
steps.evidence: Browser observed a visible button with accessible name Example before clicking.

assumptions: The target page is reachable in the current browser context.
